landing.hero: One Platform. Six Agents. Zero Blind Spots.
landing.heroSub: AI-powered operations intelligence for mega-events — from crowd safety to sustainability, all orchestrated in real-time.
landing.feature1Desc: Real-time wayfinding with dynamic rerouting when conditions change
landing.feature2Desc: AI crowd management with live density monitoring and dispatch
landing.feature3Desc: Vision-powered waste sorting and real-time sustainability tracking
landing.orchestrationDesc: When a thunderstorm hits, all six agents coordinate — Sentinel reroutes crowds, TransitFlow delays departures, AccessAll prioritizes covered routes, and Compass pushes fan alerts. One trigger. Six responses. Zero silos.
